identity.name: SISR.io
identity.description: A high-precision training platform for French IT students. The interface feels like a modern IDE or Command Center—dark, fast, and data-dense.

scale.code: text-sm font-mono bg-zinc-900 px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-cyan-400

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-600 hover:bg-cyan-500 text-white font-medium shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(6,182,212,0.3)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-md
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-zinc-200 border border-zinc-700 transition-all rounded-md
buttons.outline: border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-300 hover:border-cyan-500 hover:text-cyan-400 bg-transparent transition-all rounded-md

cards.default: bg-zinc-900/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg p-6 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 hover:border-cyan-500/50 transition-all duration-300 rounded-lg p-6 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(6,182,212,0.1)]

inputs.default: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 focus:border-cyan-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-500 text-zinc-100 placeholder:text-zinc-600 rounded-md h-10 px-3
inputs.label: text-xs font-mono text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 block

dashboard.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-zinc-950 border-r border-zinc-800 hidden md:flex flex-col z-50

marketing.hero: relative min-h-[80vh] flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden bg-grid-white/[0.02]

gradients.hero_glow: absolute top-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[1000px] h-[500px] bg-cyan-500/20 blur-[100px] rounded-full opacity-50

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all icons. Use 'Server', 'Terminal', 'Cpu', 'Shield' icons often.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
THEME SETUP: Ensure tailwind.config.js has the custom colors (zinc, cyan, indigo) configured.
NO LIGHT MODE: This is a dark-mode only app. Force 'dark' class on the html/body tag.
DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (e.g., login-btn, nav-dashboard).
LAYOUT: Use the 'Sidebar Layout' for all dashboard pages. Use 'Centered Layout' for Login/Register.
ROLE COLORS: Use Purple for Admin, Cyan for Trainer, Emerald for Student badges/highlights.
AI GRADING: When displaying AI feedback, use a 'typing' animation effect to simulate the AI thinking.
FRENCH LANGUAGE: All text must be in French. Use 'Connexion', 'Tableau de bord', 'Exercices', etc.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠.
